title: Lifetree Window Film Privcay: Frosted Film for Glass Windows Grill Patterned Self Adhesive Sun Blocking Anti Glare Window Covering Decorative Film for Home and Office (44.5 * 200cm)
features: Window Film Privacy-𝐒𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥- Simple and stylish grill style is suitable for all styles of home decoration, whether your home decoration style is French, modern or fashionable, this grill patterned window film can match it very well. This frosted design adds style to your windows and gives you a great visual experience both indoors and out

Frosted Window Film-𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐚𝐜𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 - This frosted window film gives you the privacy you need while still allowing sunlight in. With 95% privacy from one metre away, you can only see blurred shadows, blocking out everything you don't want to see and effectively protecting your privacy

Window Film-𝐀𝐧𝐭𝐢-𝐔𝐕 & 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐥 - Frosted window film blocks 96% of harmful UV rays, protects your skin and furniture from direct sunlight, helps blocking heat from the house in summer, reduces the entry of UV rays, and helps transfer heat in winter, keeping your house warm in winter and cool in summer

Privacy Window Film-𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐂𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 & 𝐑𝐞𝐮𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 - Frosted window film is made of premium material, can be self-adhesive, only need water to adsorb to the glass when installing, not easy to come off, no need to worry about leaving chemicals. The way to remove is also very simple, gently uncovered from a corner can be removed, no residue left behind

Grill Patterned Window Film-𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐥 - Suitable for all smooth surfaces. Installation is simple and easy to operate, please ensure that the glass and film is clean, and remember to peel off the backing film. If there is any problem, welcome to talk with us
